Who We Are

Ahmedabad-Based Business Consultancy

FundGrow is an Ahmedabad-based consultancy committed to empowering businesses with essential services that drive growth. From company registration to compliance, government schemes to grants — we provide comprehensive business solutions under one roof.

Our team of experienced consultants understands the challenges that Indian entrepreneurs face at every stage of their business journey. Whether you are launching your first startup, seeking government funding, or ensuring regulatory compliance, we bring the expertise and dedication needed to deliver results.

With 40+ years of combined experience, 50+ team members, and a presence across 36+ states, we have successfully executed 5,000+ projects and earned the trust of thousands of entrepreneurs through transparent pricing, honest guidance, and consistent delivery.

Our Mission

To make FundGrow the most reliable business consultancy in India. We aim to help startups, MSMEs, and entrepreneurs by giving them smart, simple, and affordable business solutions.

Our Vision

To support Indian businesses in building a strong and successful future. We want to see more startups and MSMEs grow confidently, knowing they have expert support at every step.

Our Promise

Transparent pricing, honest guidance, and no hidden charges. We are a consultancy service provider and we deliver what we promise.

Our Journey

Key Milestones

2018

Founded

FundGrow was established in Ahmedabad with a vision to provide comprehensive business consultancy services to entrepreneurs across India.

2019

1,000 Projects

Crossed the milestone of completing 1,000 projects including company registrations, certifications, and compliance filings.

2020

10+ Services

Expanded our service portfolio to 10+ categories covering registration, legal, funding, certifications, and compliance.

2022

Pan India

Extended operations across India, serving clients in 36+ states with a growing team of business consultants.

2024

4.7/5 Rating

Achieved a 4.7/5 Google rating with 1,950+ reviews, becoming one of the most trusted business consultancies in India.

2026

5,000+ Projects

Surpassed 5,000+ projects executed with 50+ team members, 40+ years of combined experience, and services spanning 7 categories.

Leadership Team

Meet the People Behind FundGrow

A leadership team with decades of combined experience in business consulting, finance, and operations.

PS

Pradip Singh

National Sales Head

Leads national sales strategy with extensive experience in business development and client relationship management across India.

RD

Rohit Dave

Chief Revenue Officer

Drives revenue growth and strategic partnerships with deep expertise in financial services and business consulting operations.

SS

Sirjan Singh

Chief Financial Officer

Oversees financial planning and compliance with a strong background in corporate finance and audit management.

UD

Uday Dubey

Branch Manager

Manages branch operations and client servicing with hands-on experience in registration, legal, and compliance services.

Our Foundation

Core Values

Client First

Every decision we make starts with what is best for our clients. Your business growth is our priority, and we assign dedicated consultants who understand your unique needs and work alongside you from day one to achieve your goals.

Result Driven

We measure our performance by the results we deliver — registrations completed on time, funding secured, and compliance maintained. Every strategy, every document, and every follow-up is aligned toward one goal: helping your business succeed.

Integrity

Transparent pricing, honest guidance, and no hidden charges. We provide realistic assessments upfront so you can make informed decisions about your business journey. We are a consultancy service provider and we deliver what we promise.

Collaboration

We work hand-in-hand with entrepreneurs, startups, MSMEs, and government bodies to build lasting relationships. Our team approach ensures you get the combined expertise of specialists across registration, legal, funding, and compliance domains.

“Sada Grow Karo — Always Keep Growing. We believe every entrepreneur in India deserves the right support to build something great.”

— FundGrow Team

Join Our Mission
